OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Override All Movement Bonuses At Zero
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Override All Movement Bonuses At Zero

OptionDescription.SourceString: Prevent players from moving if the movement multiplier is set to zero.  This overrides any other movement bonuses.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Prevent players from moving if the movement multiplier is set to zero.  This overrides any other movement bonuses.
